title: Stallings' Foundational Framework for Data Security
description: A visual representation of the core principles and components of data security and privacy as outlined by William Stallings, illustrating their interdependencies.
relationships: Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability form the foundational CIA Triad
Authentication verifies identity to enable Access Control
Access Control mechanisms enforce Confidentiality and Integrity policies
All principles work together to protect data and ensure privacy
